strengths: Strong SQL and DB experience (PostgreSQL, MySQL)
weaknesses: No direct DoorDash/merchant ad platform experience
A/B testing and experimental design not shown
Media analytics depth not clearly demonstrated
Only 2+ years relevant experience (fits low end)
improvement_bullets: Managed end-to-end campaign reporting and performance tracking for marketing initiatives, utilizing Google Sheets and Slides to present actionable insights to stakeholders.
Partnered with cross-functional sales teams to provide data-driven sales enablement materials, translating complex performance metrics into clear, client-facing business recommendations.
Designed and executed A/B testing frameworks for marketing campaigns, leveraging SQL and statistical modeling to optimize conversion rates and customer engagement.
Analyzed large-scale datasets to derive media analytics and consumer insights, directly informing campaign measurement strategies and ROI improvements.
Collaborated with marketing leads to deliver in-depth campaign reporting using Google Analytics, identifying key trends to guide budget allocation and merchant-side growth strategies.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Associate, Insights - Strategy & Operations opportunity with DoorDash. I am interested in this opportunity because I am passionate about using data to bridge the gap between technical operations and business growth in the fast-paced e-commerce advertising space. What interests me about working for DoorDash is its unique approach to empowering local economies and its transition into a comprehensive marketplace for all goods; this mission to solve complex logistics at scale inspires me. I believe my expertise in marketing analytics and my experience in cross-functional strategy would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating raw performance data into actionable business narratives. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed interactive Power BI dashboards and conducted time-series analysis to identify high-value segments, which directly supported our marketing initiatives and contributed to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Associate, Insights - Strategy & Operations role at DoorDash would allow me to bring my data storytelling skills to drive insights for your largest advertising partners. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my sales enablement and reporting skills. I streamlined client onboarding and reporting workflows, which required me to translate technical data into easy-to-digest formats for executive stakeholders to accelerate decision-making. These efforts reduced data processing time by 40% and directly supported our sales growth. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my SQL, Python, and media analytics experience in working on campaign reporting and performance optimization at DoorDash. I know that my technical proficiency and ability to collaborate with sales teams align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
